falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a reversal in the current downtrend, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a bullish phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 on the macro engine's dashboard
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would signal a confirmed blowoff top pattern, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and 83% similarity to a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic intervention would create a clear policy shift, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' phase by introducing a new, observable catalyst that overrides the existing pattern analysis.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
